description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:current-alpine Docker image and defines two stages: test and publish. In the test stage add a code-quality job that runs `npm ci` then `npm run lint`; an npm-outdated job that runs `npm ci` then `npm outdated` and is allowed to fail; a security-scan job that runs `npm audit --production`; a test-&-coverage job that runs `npm it`, publishes the `coverage/` directory as an artifact and extracts coverage with the regex `/All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/`; and a test-on-nodejs-lts job that uses the node:lts-alpine image, runs `npm it` and also extracts coverage with the same regex. In the publish stage add a coverage-report job that depends on test-&-coverage, moves `coverage/lcov-report/` to `public/`, stores the `public/` directory as an artifact, sets the environment named "coverage report" with URL https://demsking.gitlab.io/image-downloader, and runs only on the master branch. Also in publish add a package job that runs `npm pack` and saves any generated `*.tgz` files as artifacts. Finally add a publish job that creates a .npmrc containing the NPM_TOKEN secret, runs `npm publish`, sets the environment named "npm" with URL https://www.npmjs.com/package/image-downloader, and runs only for tags or pipeline triggers.
